title: Keyboard Keys
description: A map of KeyboardEvent.key values to their platform-specific key codes, scraped from MDN.

KeyCodeEntry.description: A platform-specific key name and its virtual key code.

name.description: The platform-specific key name (e.g. VK_MENU, kVK_Option, Qt::Key_Alt, KEYCODE_ALT_LEFT).

code.description: The virtual key code, typically a hex string (e.g. 0x12) or decimal number.

KeyboardKeyInfo.description: Information about a single keyboard key across platforms.

key.description: The KeyboardEvent.key value (e.g. Alt, Control, F1).

description.description: A plain-text description of the key's function.

windows.description: Windows virtual key name and code (VK_* or APPCOMMAND_* prefix).

mac.description: macOS virtual key name and code (kVK_* prefix).

qt.description: Qt key name and code (Qt::Key_* prefix).

android.description: Android key name and code (KEYCODE_* prefix).

unicode.description: A Unicode symbol representing this key (e.g. ⌘, ⇧, ⌥, ⎋).

alternativeNames.description: Common alternative names or aliases for this key (e.g. Option for Alt on Mac, Return for Enter).
